allow: PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb kill-server; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; & $adb start-server; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; & $adb devices)

PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; $deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(60\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { $state = \(& $adb -s emulator-5554 get-state 2>$null\); if \($state -eq 'device'\) { Write-Output "ready"; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 }; & $adb devices)

PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb version; Write-Output "---"; & $adb -s emulator-5554 shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>&1; Write-Output "---"; & $adb -s emulator-5554 shell getprop ro.build.version.release 2>&1)
